title: BEM-782 queue processor
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='
'
for d in ['scripts','.github/workflows','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 19:58 (UTC+3)'
def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists(): return {}
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'))
    except: return {}
prev=load('governance/state/bem781_verify_normalized_queue_dispatch_outcome.json')
prev_status=prev.get('status','unknown')
runner=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
runner_text=runner.read_text(errors='ignore') if runner.exists() else ''
script=Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py')
script.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
import os
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
from pathlib import Path
SEP="\n"
KYIV=timezone(timedelta(hours=3))
QUEUE=Path("governance/workflow_dispatch_queue")
RESULTS=Path("governance/workflow_dispatch_results")
RESULTS.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
now=datetime.now(KYIV).strftime("%Y-%m-%d | %H:%M (UTC+3)")
token_present=bool(os.environ.get("GH_TOKEN"))
items=[]
if QUEUE.exists():
    items=sorted([p for p in QUEUE.glob("*.json") if p.is_file()])
for p in items:
    try:
        data=json.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore"))
    except Exception as exc:
        out={"status":"invalid_json","queue_file":str(p),"error":str(exc),"time":now}
        (RESULTS/(p.stem+".status.json")).write_text(json.dumps(out,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+SEP,encoding="utf-8")
        continue
    workflow=data.get("workflow") or data.get("workflow_id") or data.get("file")
    ref=data.get("ref") or "main"
    inputs=data.get("inputs") or {}
    if not workflow:
        out={"status":"missing_workflow","queue_file":str(p),"time":now}
    elif not token_present:
        out={"status":"token_missing","queue_file":str(p),"workflow":workflow,"ref":ref,"inputs":inputs,"time":now}
    else:
        cmd="gh workflow run "+str(workflow)+" --ref "+str(ref)
        # No secret is printed. Use os.system only in GitHub runner, not Python executor.
        code=os.system(cmd)
        out={"status":"dispatch_attempted","exit_code":code,"queue_file":str(p),"workflow":workflow,"ref":ref,"inputs":inputs,"time":now}
    (RESULTS/(p.stem+".status.json")).write_text(json.dumps(out,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+SEP,encoding="utf-8")
print(json.dumps({"status":"queue_processed","items":len(items),"token_present":token_present},ensure_ascii=False))
''')
commit_script=Path('scripts/commit_workflow_dispatch_results.sh')
commit_script.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
git add -A governance/workflow_dispatch_results || true
git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No dispatch result changes" || git commit -m "BEM-782 workflow dispatch queue results"
git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
git push || true
''')
insert='''
      - name: Process workflow dispatch queue
        if: always()
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}
        run: python3 scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py
      - name: Commit workflow dispatch queue results
        if: always()
        run: bash scripts/commit_workflow_dispatch_results.sh
'''
changed=False
if runner.exists() and 'scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py' not in runner_text:
    marker='      - name: Complete job'
    if marker in runner_text:
        runner_text=runner_text.replace(marker,insert+marker,1)
    else:
        runner_text=runner_text+insert
    runner.write_text(runner_text)
    changed=True
status='codex_runner_queue_processor_installed' if changed or 'scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py' in runner_text else 'failed'
blocker=None if status=='codex_runner_queue_processor_installed' else {'code':'CODEX_RUNNER_PATCH_FAILED'}
pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem782_next_tick_queue_processor.md')
pending.write_text('# BEM-782 Next | Tick queue processor'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Previous BEM-781: '+str(prev_status)+sep+'Next: run fresh Codex tick to process queue and inspect workflow_dispatch_results.'+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-782 QUEUE PROCESSOR PATCH'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: fresh Codex tick then verify workflow_dispatch_results and Claude runtime. Operator relay: forbidden.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'patch_codex_runner_queue_processor.v1','bem':'BEM-782','status':status,'previous_bem781_status':prev_status,'runner_changed':changed,'script':str(script),'commit_script':str(commit_script),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem782_patch_codex_runner_queue_processor.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem782_patch_codex_runner_queue_processor.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-782 | Patch Codex Runner Queue Processor | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Previous BEM-781: '+str(prev_status)+sep+'Runner changed: '+str(changed)+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem782_patch_codex_runner_queue_processor','status':status,'previous_bem781_status':prev_status,'runner_changed':changed,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem782_patch_codex_runner_queue_processor.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-782 '+status+' runner_changed='+str(changed)+'
')
changed_files.extend([str(script),str(commit_script),str(runner),str(pending),str(handoff),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Patched codex-runner to process governance/workflow_dispatch_queue directly and commit explicit workflow_dispatch_results')
"""
